description: Letter and bills from Sicily, probably to Yosef b. Ya’aqov b. Awkal, Fustat. Some of the bills are directed to b. Awkal for washing fabrics, and it seems like the other bills and the letter are addressed to him as well. Mentions selling linen and indigo in Palermo. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #201) VMR
description_he: מכתב ושטרות מסיציליה, כנראה ליוסף בן יעקב בן אוקאל, פוסטאט, על מכירת פשתן ואינדיגו בפלרמו
